label: Lockheed Martin
info: World's largest defense contractor. Primary F-35 maker. Received $72B in Pentagon contracts in FY2023. Primary beneficiary of Ukraine artillery and HIMARS replenishment.

label: Boeing (Defense)
info: Supplies Small Diameter Bombs and JDAM precision kits to Israel. Awarded $18.8B F-15 contract for Israel in Aug 2024. Main shareholding held by the Big Three.

label: RTX (Raytheon)
conflict_systems: Patriot Missile (Ukraine), Iron Dome (Israel), NASAMS, ATACMS
info: Manufacturer of Iron Dome interceptors and Patriot batteries. Ukraine's primary air defense provider. Massive profit surge from missile replenishment contracts ($4B+ since Oct 2023).

label: Northrop Grumman
info: B-21 Raider bomber. Received $32B in Pentagon contracts in FY2023. Lobbied Congress for $116M in FY2024 contracts.

label: General Dynamics
info: M1 Abrams tank, Stryker. 25% revenue surge from Ukraine armor demand in 2023. Gulfstream jet subsidiary.

label: ExxonMobil
info: World's largest publicly-traded oil company. Largest corporate donor to Senate Republicans via PAC and bundled contributions. Top recipient: Ted Cruz ($445k+). Integrated in US Middle East security umbrella.

label: Chevron
info: Global oil giant with deep strategic interest in the Middle East. Top Cornyn donor in TX. BlackRock top shareholder.

label: ConocoPhillips
info: Significant energy lobby player focused on resource security and extraction. Key Oklahoma donor (Lankford, Mullin).

label: BlackRock
info: World's largest asset manager. Holds ~8% of Lockheed Martin. Core infrastructure for Sovereign Wealth investment (Norway/Singapore/Kuwait) into US defense tech.

label: Vanguard
info: Major institutional giant. Holds ~9% of Lockheed Martin. Primarily manages client-owned funds (pension funds, retail investors) rather than proprietary money. Often the #1 or #2 shareholder in the entire US defense sector.

label: State Street
info: Third of the 'Big Three'. Holds ~14-15% of Lockheed Martin. Centralized financial influence layer holding shares on behalf of global investors. Essential component of the defense industry's institutional ownership structure.
